SRI.description:
Standards Record Index — local wrapper for a standards payload's identity
and mutation metadata, participating in shared FlatSQL query and cascade
paths across plugins that read the same record universe.

RECORD_KEY.description: Stable host-local record key for one standards payload.

SCHEMA_NAME.description: SDS schema family for the record (`OMM`, `CAT`, `OEM`, `CDM`, etc.).

ROLE.description: Attachment role when one standards message produces multiple entity records.

ATTACHED_VIA.description: Ingest path that registered this record (`stream-*`, `manual-api`, etc.).

PAYLOAD_KIND.description: High-level payload representation retained by the mutation registry.

UPDATED_AT_MS.description: Milliseconds since epoch when the local mutation record was last refreshed.
